characters.name: Abina
characters.description: Abinais a scavenger who works in anE-waste landfillinAgbobgloshie, Ghana. She has incredible computer science skills that she used to make more profit from the electronic waste she harvested. Abina eventually becomes the leader of the landfill afterThe Phoenix Foundationhelps her overthrow Joseph’s corrupt operation. At some point early in her life, Abina began working in Joseph’s E-waste landfill. Abina had a natural aptitude for working with technology and growth to become one of Joseph’s lead underlings. She befriended the other scavengers and often gave them instructions on how to work safer and more efficiently. She was able to use her computer skills to write an algorithm that would find illicit photos on the hard drives that Joseph could use to blackmail the former owners of the computers. Living and working import conditions led her to dream about moving to theUnited Statesand studying computer science at a university.

characters.name: Agent Cynthia
characters.description: Agent Cynthiais a military pilot and works withThe Phoenix Foundation. On the way back from capturing a war criminal,MacGyverandJack’shelicopter crashes in a remote area ofKazakhstan, injuring Agent Cynthia and allowing their prisoner to escape with Jack’s gun. Using a large blade and a water bottle, MacGyver must get help as Cynthia’s condition worsens and before the war criminal takes them as prisoners.

characters.name: Alonzo Olvera
characters.description: Alonzo Olverais a international black market arms dealer. He has a Daughter named Camila Olvera who he left in the United States. Camila fell in love with and married A man named Jacob. After two Assassination attempts He offered to turn himself in, if he gets to go to Camila's wedding and walk her down the aisle. He managed to walk her down the aisle and spent some time with his family until his Mother, Named Abuela  poisoned him with cyanide through a injection.

characters.name: Amber
characters.description: Amberis a professional assassin whoMurdocrefers to as his wife. She'sCassian's mother. According to Murdoc, he met Amber inMoscow, Russia, when both parties were hired separately to assassinate the same target. Amber and Murdoc fired on the target at the same time and both hit the target, making it impossible to know who actually made the kill. They decided to split the payment and subsequently fell in love.[1]It is unknown how long Amber knew Murdoc before Cassian’s birth or how long she spent as an involved parent.

characters.name: Anne Frost
characters.description: MajorAnne Frostwith an officer who served in the Department of Defense under the command of GeneralJohn Acosta. She was secretly a member ofCodexwho aimed to rearrange the balance of power in the world. Major Frost was a US Marine Corps officer who at some point became radicalized and joined a mysterious terrorist organization and she served under General Acosta and other members of her organization abducted the general’s family and blackmailed him into giving her organization control of the NORAD missile-defense system. AfterAngus MacGyverbroke intoCheyenne Mountain Complexand convinced the general not to use theQuantum Recursive Chipshe revealed her true allegiances and attempted to complete the mission. She was killed by Air Force security officers after Mac destroyed the chip.

characters.name: Anya Vitez
characters.description: Anya Vitezwas the head of Interpol's anti-terror unit and a terrorist operating under the alias ofTiberius Kovac. Anya joined Interpol and rose through the ranks until she became the head of the organization's anti-terror unit, but her work for Interpol was really a front to hide that she was forming and collecting cash for a chaos terrorist cell. In order to secretly carry out terror attacks, she created the persona known as Tiberius Kovac and used his image as a front for her activities. While Kovac had a reputation for being an anarchist, Vitez was secretly carrying out chaos for cash work for her elite client base, which included multiple corporations, governments, and billionaires.[1]

characters.name: Aubrey Jones
characters.description: Aubrey JonesisRiley Davis's ex-boyfriend. They broke up at the end ofEpisode 7of Season 4. Aubrey Jones is an accountant who briefly dated Riley Davis. He also invests in a restaurant as a "side hustle".

characters.name: Ian Cain
characters.description: Ian Cainis a veteranCIAagent who was a hero during the Cold War. He took a youngMatty Webberunder his wing and became her mentor. Cain was a legend during the Cold War. He holds the record for getting defectors across the Berlin Wall and single-handedly stopped a Russian military coup against Gorbachev which, saved the peace process. When the Soviet Union began to collapse Cain was responsible for retrieving all of the dangerous weapons they had commissioned and feeling them in secured CIA facilities. One of the weapons that Cain was sent to apprehend was an incomplete directed Sonic based energy weapon known asOperation Harpy. Cain retrieved Harpy successfully and he stored it in the basement of the field office. WhenMatty Webber’s first mission went sideways Cain mounted a rescue using a stolen Canadian helicopter. He would go on to partner with Matty on many of her early missions and the two established a strong bond with each other. Matty claims that Ian helped her get over a broken heart implying that he was there for her after her husbandEthan Reignsdisappeared. As Cain began to grow older he decided to take a low-key post in the CIA's field office in Slovenia. Even though he was taking a step away from the action, his position allowed him to continue to mentor young agents.

characters.name: Carla Bannister
characters.description: Carla Bannisterwas an agent ofThe Phoenix Foundation. She was sent to track down a rumoured Soviet weapon in Russia. She found it and got information to the Phoenix Foundation. Just as she was about to leave, a team came in and killed her.

characters.name: Cassian
characters.description: Cassian is the son ofMurdocandAmberwho remains in the dark about what his parents do for a living. MurdochelpsMacGyverimpersonate him to find a highly sought after target. Murdoc is reluctant to help at first but whenMatilda Webbersearches more into Murdoc, she finds that he has a son, who Murdoc sends presents for his birthday and Christmas, and has used extensive resources to keep his son hidden and safe, including sending his son to an exclusive private school inSwitzerland. His son is also unaware of what his father does for a living.[1]

characters.name: Charlie Robinson
characters.description: Charlie Robinsonwas an Army EOD Instructor and formerFBIbomb analytics expert and Army EOD Technician. While he was in the army, he metAngus MacGyverwhile on a two weeks mission in Kabul. Together, they dismantled a record 127 IEDs. Charlie teamed up withThe Phoenix Foundationto stopThe Ghostfrom carrying out an attack against The United Nations.

characters.name: Elwood Davis
characters.description: Elwood Davisis the ex abusive husband ofDiane DavisandRiley Davis'sfather. He is the father ofRiley Davisand ex husband ofDiane Daviswhom he was abusive towards something which Riley was aware of, and they split up at some point in her childhood.

characters.name: Riley Davis
characters.description: Elwood Davis(father)  Riley Davisis a member ofThe Phoenix Foundationand has an impressive computer hacking background. She is a part ofMacGyver's team. Throughout her teenage years, Riley knows how to take care of herself and puts the people closest to her above her own needs. While she is snarky, sarcastic and has a smart remark for any situation, she does have a good heart, and this, combined with her sense of loyalty, is why she allowed herself to be arrested and sent to prison to, not only foil the enemy's plot to make her steal a cyber-weapon, but to secure her mother's safety. One of Riley's biggest traits is her tendency to hold a grudge. This was especially prominent with her initial interactions with her former father-figure,Jack Dalton, where she often made snide remarks about him. However, after both managed to clear their air after an intense mission, she sets aside her animosity towards him, but she still makes smart remarks at his expense, only more light-hearted. She has a tendency to play hard to get, as she noticed Bozer's attraction to her right away and in exchange for helping her out, she would give him a digit to her phone number.

characters.name: Desiree Nguyen
characters.description: Desiree "Desi" Nguyenis a new recruit forThe Phoenix Foundationthat was introduced inK-9 + Smugglers + New Recruit. She takes over Jack's role as an Overwatch for MacGyver. She also serves as his love interest. She was introduced as a recurring character inSeason 3and was promoted to a main character inSeason 4. Desi is one of the first women to graduate from U.S. Army Ranger School. While in the Army, she was assigned to a special ops team consisting of forces from the SAS,Delta Forceand theCIA.[2] Desi met Jack Dalton when he plucked her out of Ranger School to work on a special op. At first, she was disappointed because Jack only chose her since the mission required a linguist who spoke Vietnamese. Jack was able to win Desi over by treating her with a high level of respect even though she was a rookie. Desi and Jack developed a strong friendship and Desi felt indebted to him.[3]

characters.description: Diane Davisis the mother ofRiley Davis. She is the mother ofRiley Davisand ex wife ofElwood Davis. Her husband was abusive towards her, something which Riley was aware of, and they split up at some point in her childhood.

characters.name: Eli Brown
characters.description: Eli Brownis a young inventor who is a new agent atThe Phoenix Foundation. Eli's parents were Chinese nationals who lived in the United States. His family lived in the Pinecliff Road Apartments complex and they would all frequently get ice cream from a local store near the building. Eli's parents had connections to the Chinese Defense Ministry. They discovered a trader in the FBI who was secretly working with the Chinese government. They approached FBI counterintelligence agentsElliot Masonand Joshua tried to defect to the United States. Mason and Joshua convinced Eli's parents to collect encrypted communications from the mole. Eli’s parents have lost faith in the FBI after they learned that agent Joshua was the mole and they decided to hide the phone and go on the run. Joshua arranged for the family to be killed in a car crash but Mason arrived and was able to save Eli.

characters.description: TechnologyEngineeringMathematics  Dr. Ellen MacGyver PhD née Hayeswas a renowned former science operative for theDepartment of External Services, the wife ofJames MacGyver, the mother ofAngus MacGyverand the elder sister ofGwendolyn Hayes.
